data.title: $1000 Invested In KLA 10 Years Ago Would Be Worth This Much Today
data.description:
KLA (NASDAQ:KLAC) has outperformed the market over the past 10 years by 24.83% on an annualized basis producing an average annual return of 37.39%. Currently, KLA has a market capitalization of $228.34 billion.

Buying $1000 In KLAC: If an investor had bought $1000 of KLAC stock 10 years ago, it would be worth $23,831.00 today based on a price of $1742.00 for KLAC at the time of writing.

Finally -- what's the point of all this? The key insight to take from this article is to note how much of a difference compounded returns can make in your cash growth over a period of time.
